UnitAbilities.Title: Assault Ramp
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Possessed or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mortis Strike
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Armoured Spearhead
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Options: heavy flamer and Dreadnought combat weapon
Dreadnought inferno cannon and armoured feet
heavy plasma cannon and armoured feet
storm bolter and Dreadnought combat weapon
heavy flamer and Dreadnought combat weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Spiritual Leader
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Adeptus Astartes unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

UnitAbilities.Title: Isolate and Destroy
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, if there are no other units from your opponent’s army within 6" of that target, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rites of Battle
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Death-hold
UnitAbilities.Text: When making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Into the Foe
UnitAbilities.Text: If a unit disembarks from this Transport before it moves, until the end of the turn, that unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. Before selecting targets with this weapon, select one of its profiles to make attacks with.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Wisdom of the Ancients (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Self Repair
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Orbital Comms Array (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you target that unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack, Wulfen, Phobos, Gravis, Centurion, Terminator or Tacticus models (except for Tacticus Character models that begin the battle attached to a non-Tacticus unit).

UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted by a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted by that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Swift Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unbreakable Duty
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within range of an objective marker and/or within 6" of the centre of the battlefield, this model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

LeaderInfo.Description: You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one Character model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire Support
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack, Wulfen, Phobos, Gravis, Centurion, Terminator or Tacticus models (except for Tacticus Character models that begin the battle attached to a non-Tacticus unit).

UnitAbilities.Title: Storm Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vanguard Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Infos.Title: COMMAND SQUAD BODYGUARD
Infos.Text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Bike Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Honour or Death
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit and you can target that unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Martial Superiority
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a Character unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Astartes Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unbreakable Duty
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within range of an objective marker and/or within 6" of the centre of the battlefield, this model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability

UnitAbilities.Title: Narthecium
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding Character models) to that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gene-seed Recovery
UnitAbilities.Text: When this model’s Bodyguard unit is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 2+, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Techmarine
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blessing of the Omnissiah
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vengeance of the Omnissiah
UnitAbilities.Text: If a friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model is destroyed within 12" of this model, until the end of the battle, this model’s Omnissian power axe has an Attacks characteristic of 7.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Hood
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mental Fortress (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aerial Deployment
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model starts the game in Hover mode and in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-10 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 15 Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models. Each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models. Each Mounted model takes up the space of 4 models. This model can also transport up to 2 Adeptus Astartes Vehicle models (excluding Aircraft and Titanic models). Models embarked within Transport Vehicles that are themselves being transported by this model do not count towards the transport capacity of this model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sentry Programming
UnitAbilities.Text: You can target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn. This model can only be targeted with that Stratagem once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Text: While a Techmarine model is leading this unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of ranged and melee weapons equipped by Astartes Servitor models in this unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hammer of Wrath
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNITS
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs, it can also be attached to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains an Apothecary, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding Character models) to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Astartes Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains a Company Ancient, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Honour or Death
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains a Company Champion, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit and you can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNITS
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Company Heroes unit, it can also be attached to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Grenade Harness
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has the Grenades keyword.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fury of the First
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristic and/or to the Hit roll. In addition, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the enemy unit you selected for the Oath of Moment ability this turn, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNITS
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Terminator Squad, it can also be attached to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Concealed Positions
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 12".

UnitAbilities.Title: Turbo-boost
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNITS
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an Outrider Squad, it can also be attached to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Outrider Escort
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly Adeptus Astartes Mounted unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, this unit can use this ability. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, this unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

UnitAbilities.Title: Outflank
UnitAbilities.Text: When this unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

UnitAbilities.Title: Strafing Enfilade
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) that it moved over during that move, then roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire and Redeploy
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, each time this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Hood
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Might of Heroes (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

UnitNames: VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS

UnitAbilities.Title: Tremor Shells
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy Infantry unit was hit by one or more attacks made by this unit’s thunderfire cannon this phase, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Crewed Artillery
UnitAbilities.Text: If one model in this unit is destroyed, the remaining model in this unit is also destroyed.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hunter Missile Targeting
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack with its skyspear missile launcher that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, that attack scores a hit on an unmodified Hit roll of 2+.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Skyfire Protocols
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target this model with the Overwatch Stratagem just after an enemy unit that can Fly starts or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, when resolving that Stratagem, in addition to shooting that enemy unit, you can select up to three additional enemy units within 24" of this model that can Fly; this model can also shoot at each of those units with its Icarus stormcannons (provided each one is an eligible target), but when doing so, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit.

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Line-breaker
UnitAbilities.Text: When making ranged attacks, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it with Blast weapons (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Even In Death I Serve
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Scorpius multi-launcher scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Drop Pod Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model must immediately disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models. After this model has been set up on the battlefield, no units can embark within it.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 1 Dreadnought model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Termite Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models.

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Armoured Resilience
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. Before selecting targets with this weapon, select one of its profiles to make attacks with.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 22 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models and 1 Dreadnought model. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Terminator or Possessed model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion or Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strafing Run
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sunderer of Fortresses
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Vehicle, improve the Strength and Damage characteristic of that attack by 1 (if that attack targets a Fortification unit, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead).

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Atomantic Arc-reactor
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit shoots its Cerberus neutron pulse array in your Shooting phase, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, that weapon has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Assault Ramp
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. Before selecting targets with this weapon, select one of its profiles to make attacks with.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 28 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Possessed or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion or Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rolling Fortress
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fellblade model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Titan-killer
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its twin Falchion volcano cannon that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Inviolable Transport
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, when an attack is allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-10 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 6 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 45 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Possessed or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion or Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models. This model can also transport up to 2 Dreadnought or Helbrute models (these models take up the space of a number of models equal to their Wounds characteristic e.g. A Dreadnought with a Wounds characteristic of 8 would take up the space of 8 models).

UnitAbilities.Title: Sentinel Protocols
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you select this unit for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ when resolving that Stratagem.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aerial Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1–13 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1–13 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 55 Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Possessed or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Mounted, Centurion or Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models. This model can also transport up to 1 Rhino model (this model – and any models embarked within it – take up the space of 25 models).

UnitAbilities.Title: Master of Rites
UnitAbilities.Text:
In your Command phase, select one of the following to apply to this model’s unit until the end of the turn:
▪ This model’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.
▪ This model’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
▪ This model’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unrelenting and Uncompromising
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

Options: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour

WargearDefinitions.Key: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour
GrantsAbilities: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour

Values: VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS

UnitAbilities.Title: Exemplar Warrior
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when this model’s unit is selected to shoot or fight, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Conversion Field
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 10", its Toughness characteristic to 6 and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Jump Pack, Fly and Gravis keywords, it gains the Deep Strike ability and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Inceptor Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Jump Pack
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", add the Fly and Jump Pack keywords, it gains the Deep Strike ability and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs, Vanguard Veteran Squad with Jump Packs.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mk X Gravis Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness characteristic to 6 and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Gravis keyword and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Gravis (excluding Fly).

UnitAbilities.Title: Mk X Phobos Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: This model gains the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities, remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Phobos keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Eliminator Squad, Incursor Squad, Infiltrator Squad, Reiver Squad, Scout Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Raider-pattern Bike
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 5, and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Infantry and Tacticus keywords, add the Mounted keyword, it is equipped with 1 twin bolt rifle in addition to the weapons you choose in the next step, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Outrider Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Terminator Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness characteristic to 5, its Save characteristic to 2+, and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Terminator keyword, it has a 4+ invulnerable save, it gains the Deep Strike ability, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Terminator Assault Squad, Terminator Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Adamantine Will
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Astartes Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blessing of the Omnissiah
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Litany of Hate
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Narthecium
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding Character models) to that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rites of Battle
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tactical Precision
UnitAbilities.Text: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
